_**User**_

有好几个问题需要调整：

- 兼容性问题：
Json Path Navigator 1.0.10 depends on optional plugin org.jetbrains.plugins.json that couldn't be resolved with respect to IntelliJ IDEA IU-261.22158.277
- 1 deprecated API usage
  - Json Path Navigator 1.0.10 uses deprecated API, which may be removed in future releases leading to binary and source code incompatibilities
    - Deprecated method usage 
      - ReadAction.compute(ThrowableComputable) 
        - Deprecated method ReadAction.compute(ThrowableComputable) is invoked in FindJsonKeyAction.actionPerformed(AnActionEvent) 

- 支持的版本：IDE已经发布了新的版本，应该纳入支持范围。

- 自动化测试需要提升覆盖率。

- 文件整理。

- 测试：IDE手动测试时，如何指定IDE版本？有哪些IDE版本需要手动测试？

- 关于文档，可以更加详细，让没接触过的人也能快速入门和进阶，尤其是测试相关。

Json Path Navigator\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n![Build](https://github.com/wenmin92/JsonPathNavigator/workflows/Build/badge.svg)\\\\\\\\n[![Version](https://img.shields.io/jetbrains/plugin/v/cc.wenmin92.jsonpathnavigator.svg)](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/plugin/cc.wenmin92.jsonpathnavigator)\\\\\\\\n[![Downloads](https://img.shields.io/jetbrains/plugin/d/cc.wenmin92.jsonpathnavigator.svg)](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/plugin/cc.wenmin92.jsonpathnavigator)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\u003e 🔍 一个帮助你在项目中快速查找 JSON 键的 JetBrains IDE 插件\\\\\\\\n\u003e\\\\\\\\n\u003e A JetBrains IDE plugin for quickly finding JSON keys in your project\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\u003c!-- Plugin description --\u003e\\\\\\\\nA JetBrains IDE plugin for quickly finding JSON keys in your project.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**Features:**\\\\\\\\n- 🔍 **Quick Search** - Locate JSON keys by path instantly\\\\\\\\n- 💡 **Smart Suggestions** - Auto-suggest paths as you type\\\\\\\\n- 👁️ **Value Preview** - Show value preview of matches\\\\\\\\n- 📍 **One-Click Navigation** - Double-click to jump to file location\\\\\\\\n- 🖱️ **Context Menu** - Right-click selected text to search\\\\\\\\n- ⌨️ **Smart Selection** - Auto-detect JSON path at cursor position\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**Usage:** Press &#96;Ctrl+Alt+Shift+F&#96; (Windows/Linux) or &#96;⌘+⇧+⌥+F&#96; (macOS) to open the search dialog.\\\\\\\\n\u003c!-- Plugin description end --\u003e\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## ✨ 功能特性 / Features\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| 功能 | Feature | 说明 / Description |\\\\\\\\n|------|---------|-------------------|\\\\\\\\n| 🔍 快速搜索 | Quick Search | 通过键路径快速定位 JSON 键 / Quickly locate JSON keys by path |\\\\\\\\n| 💡 智能建议 | Smart Suggestions | 输入时自动提示可能的路径 / Auto-suggest paths as you type |\\\\\\\\n| 👁️ 值预览 | Value Preview | 显示匹配项的值预览 / Show value preview of matches |\\\\\\\\n| 📍 一键跳转 | One-Click Navigation | 双击结果直接跳转到文件位置 / Double-click to jump to file |\\\\\\\\n| 🖱️ 右键菜单 | Context Menu | 选中文本后右键即可搜索 / Right-click selected text to search |\\\\\\\\n| ⌨️ 智能取词 | Smart Selection | 自动识别光标处的 JSON 路径 / Auto-detect JSON path at cursor |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## ⚡ 快速开始 / Quick Start\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 🎯 3 种方式打开搜索对话框 / 3 Ways to Open Search Dialog\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| 方式 / Method | 操作 / Action |\\\\\\\\n|--------------|--------------|\\\\\\\\n| **⌨️ 快捷键** | Windows/Linux: &#96;Ctrl + Alt + Shift + F&#96;\u003cbr\u003emacOS: &#96;⌘ + ⇧ + ⌥ + F&#96; |\\\\\\\\n| **🖱️ 右键菜单** | 选中文本 → 右键 → **Find Key in JSON** |\\\\\\\\n| **📋 Edit 菜单** | 菜单栏 → Edit → **Find Key in JSON** |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 📖 基本使用流程 / Basic Usage\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n1️⃣ 按下 Ctrl+Alt+Shift+F 打开搜索对话框\\\\\\\\n   Press Ctrl+Alt+Shift+F to open search dialog\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n2️⃣ 输入要搜索的 JSON 键路径，如：database.host\\\\\\\\n   Enter JSON key path, e.g.: database.host\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n3️⃣ 查看搜索结果，双击跳转到对应文件位置\\\\\\\\n   View results, double-click to navigate to file\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 🎹 对话框内快捷键 / Dialog Shortcuts\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| 操作 / Action | 快捷键 / Shortcut |\\\\\\\\n|--------------|------------------|\\\\\\\\n| 执行搜索 / Search | &#96;Enter&#96; |\\\\\\\\n| 关闭对话框 / Close | &#96;Esc&#96; |\\\\\\\\n| 跳转到结果 / Navigate | 双击结果行 / Double-click |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 📝 搜索语法 / Search Syntax\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n使用 &#96;.&#96; (点) 分隔嵌套的键名 / Use &#96;.&#96; (dot) to separate nested keys:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n简单键 / Simple key:        name\\\\\\\\n嵌套路径 / Nested path:     config.database.host\\\\\\\\n多层嵌套 / Deep nesting:    app.settings.ui.theme\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 示例 / Example\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n对于以下 JSON / For this JSON:\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\\\\\\\\n{\\\\\\\\n  \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"database\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": {\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"host\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"localhost\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\",\\\\\\\\n    \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"port\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\": 5432\\\\\\\\n  }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| 搜索路径 / Search Path | 找到 / Found |\\\\\\\\n|----------------------|--------------|\\\\\\\\n| &#96;database.host&#96; | &#96;\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"localhost\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"&#96; |\\\\\\\\n| &#96;database.port&#96; | &#96;5432&#96; |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 💻 支持的 IDE / Supported IDEs\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- IntelliJ IDEA (Community \u0026 Ultimate)\\\\\\\\n- WebStorm\\\\\\\\n- PyCharm\\\\\\\\n- GoLand\\\\\\\\n- PhpStorm\\\\\\\\n- Rider\\\\\\\\n- CLion\\\\\\\\n- 其他 JetBrains IDE (2024.1+) / Other JetBrains IDEs (2024.1+)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 📦 安装方法 / Installation\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 方法一：从 IDE 插件市场安装（推荐）/ Method 1: IDE Marketplace (Recommended)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. 打开设置 / Open Settings\\\\\\\\n   - Windows/Linux: &#96;File&#96; → &#96;Settings&#96; → &#96;Plugins&#96;\\\\\\\\n   - macOS: &#96;IntelliJ IDEA&#96; → &#96;Preferences&#96; → &#96;Plugins&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n2. 点击 &#96;Marketplace&#96; 标签，搜索 **\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Json Path Navigator\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"**\\\\\\\\n   Click &#96;Marketplace&#96; tab, search for **\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Json Path Navigator\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"**\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n3. 点击 &#96;Install&#96;，然后重启 IDE\\\\\\\\n   Click &#96;Install&#96;, then restart IDE\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 方法二：手动安装 / Method 2: Manual Installation\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. 从 [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/wenmin92/JsonPathNavigator/releases) 下载 &#96;.zip&#96; 文件\\\\\\\\n   Download &#96;.zip&#96; from [GitHub Releases](https://github.com/wenmin92/JsonPathNavigator/releases)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n2. 打开 IDE 设置 → &#96;Plugins&#96; → ⚙️ → &#96;Install Plugin from Disk...&#96;\\\\\\\\n   Open IDE Settings → &#96;Plugins&#96; → ⚙️ → &#96;Install Plugin from Disk...&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n3. 选择下载的文件，重启 IDE\\\\\\\\n   Select downloaded file, restart IDE\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## ⚙️ 自定义快捷键 / Customize Shortcuts\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n如果默认快捷键与其他插件冲突，可以自定义：\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nIf the default shortcut conflicts with other plugins:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. 打开设置 → &#96;Keymap&#96;\\\\\\\\n   Open Settings → &#96;Keymap&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n2. 搜索 **\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Find Key in JSON\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"**\\\\\\\\n   Search for **\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Find Key in JSON\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"**\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n3. 右键 → &#96;Add Keyboard Shortcut&#96; → 输入新快捷键\\\\\\\\n   Right-click → &#96;Add Keyboard Shortcut&#96; → Enter new shortcut\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 📚 详细文档 / Documentation\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**用户文档 / User Docs:**\\\\\\\\n- [中文用户指南](docs/USER_GUIDE_CN.md) - 完整的功能说明和使用技巧\\\\\\\\n- [English User Guide](docs/USER_GUIDE_EN.md) - Complete features and tips\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**开发者文档 / Developer Docs:**\\\\\\\\n- [开发文档](docs/DEVELOPMENT.md) - 开发者指南和架构说明\\\\\\\\n- [发布指南](docs/RELEASE.md) - 插件发布流程和问题解决\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## ❓ 常见问题 / FAQ\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\u003cdetails\u003e\\\\\\\\n\u003csummary\u003e\u003cb\u003eQ: 搜索没有结果？/ No search results?\u003c/b\u003e\u003c/summary\u003e\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. 检查键名拼写（大小写敏感）/ Check spelling (case-sensitive)\\\\\\\\n2. 使用完整路径，如 &#96;config.host&#96; 而非 &#96;host&#96; / Use full path\\\\\\\\n3. 确保文件扩展名是 &#96;.json&#96; / Ensure file extension is &#96;.json&#96;\\\\\\\\n4. 确保文件在项目目录内 / Ensure file is in project\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\u003c/details\u003e\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\u003cdetails\u003e\\\\\\\\n\u003csummary\u003e\u003cb\u003eQ: 支持 JSON5/JSONC 吗？/ Support JSON5/JSONC?\u003c/b\u003e\u003c/summary\u003e\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n目前只支持标准 JSON 格式。/ Currently only standard JSON is supported.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\u003c/details\u003e\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\u003cdetails\u003e\\\\\\\\n\u003csummary\u003e\u003cb\u003eQ: 能搜索数组元素吗？/ Search array elements?\u003c/b\u003e\u003c/summary\u003e\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n暂不支持数组索引，如 &#96;items[0].name&#96;。/ Array indexing like &#96;items[0].name&#96; is not supported yet.\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n\u003c/details\u003e\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 🤝 反馈与贡献 / Feedback \u0026 Contributing\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **🐛 问题反馈 / Bug Reports**: [GitHub GitHub Actions Workflow is created for testing and preparing the plugin release in the following steps:\\\\\\\\n# - Validate Gradle Wrapper.\\\\\\\\n# - Run 'test' and 'verifyPlugin' tasks.\\\\\\\\n# - Run Qodana inspections.\\\\\\\\n# - Run the 'buildPlugin' task and prepare artifact for further tests.\\\\\\\\n# - Run the 'runPluginVerifier' task.\\\\\\\\n# - Create a draft release.\\\\\\\\n#\\\\\\\\n# The workflow is triggered on push and pull_request events.\\\\\\\\n#\\\\\\\\n# GitHub Actions reference: https://help.github.com/en/actions\\\\\\\\n#\\\\\\\\n## 2025-12-15\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Added\\\\\\\\n- Context menu integration (right-click to search selected text)\\\\\\\\n- Added to Edit menu\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Improved\\\\\\\\n- Dialog UI enhancements\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## [1.0.5] - 2025-12-10\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Added\\\\\\\\n- Smart suggestions while typing\\\\\\\\n- Suggestion list shows matching key paths from project\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## [1.0.4] - 2025-12-05\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Added\\\\\\\\n- Value preview in search results\\\\\\\\n- Support for displaying truncated long values\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## [1.0.3] - 2025-12-01\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Added\\\\\\\\n- Line number display in results\\\\\\\\n- Click to navigate to exact line in file\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## [1.0.2] - 2025-11-25\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Added\\\\\\\\n- Support for nested JSON object paths\\\\\\\\n- Path syntax using dot notation (e.g., &#96;database.host&#96;)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## [1.0.1] - 2025-11-20\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### [发布概述](#1-发布概述)\\\\\\\\n2. [前置准备](#2-前置准备)\\\\\\\\n3. [GitHub Actions 自动发布](#3-github-actions-自动发布)\\\\\\\\n4. [手动发布](#4-手动发布)\\\\\\\\n5. [常见问题与解决方案](#5-常见问题与解决方案)\\\\\\\\n6. [发布检查清单](#6-发布检查清单)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 1. 发布概述\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 1.1 发布方式\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n本项目支持两种发布方式：\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n| 方式 | 优点 | 缺点 | 适用场景 |\\\\\\\\n|------|------|------|----------|\\\\\\\\n| **GitHub Actions 自动发布** | 自动化、可重复、有记录 | 需要配置 Secrets | ✅ 推荐用于正式发布 |\\\\\\\\n| **手动发布** | 简单、快速 | 容易出错、无记录 | 仅用于测试或紧急情况 |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 1.2 发布流程图\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n更新版本号和 CHANGELOG\\\\\\\\n        ↓\\\\\\\\n提交并推送到 main 分支\\\\\\\\n        ↓\\\\\\\\nGitHub Actions 自动构建\\\\\\\\n        ↓\\\\\\\\n创建 Draft Release\\\\\\\\n        ↓\\\\\\\\n手动审核并发布 Release ← 你在这里\\\\\\\\n        ↓\\\\\\\\nGitHub Actions 自动发布到 Marketplace\\\\\\\\n        ↓\\\\\\\\n用户可以更新插件\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 2. 前置准备\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 2.1 JetBrains Marketplace 账号\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**首次发布需要：**\\\\\\\\n1. 访问 https://plugins.jetbrains.com/\\\\\\\\n2. 使用 JetBrains 账号登录\\\\\\\\n3. 创建插件（如果是首次发布）\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 2.2 获取 PUBLISH_TOKEN\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**步骤：**\\\\\\\\n1. 访问 https://plugins.jetbrains.com/author/me/tokens\\\\\\\\n2. 点击 **\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Generate New Token\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"**\\\\\\\\n3. 填写信息：\\\\\\\\n   - **Token name**: &#96;JsonPathNavigator GitHub Actions&#96;\\\\\\\\n   - **权限**: 勾选 ✅ **Upload plugins**\\\\\\\\n4. 点击 **\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Generate\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"**\\\\\\\\n5. **⚠️ 重要**: 立即复制 Token（只显示一次）\\\\\\\\n6. 保存到安全的地方（如密码管理器）\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 2.3 配置 GitHub Secrets\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**步骤：**\\\\\\\\n1. 访问仓库 Secrets 设置：\\\\\\\\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n   https://github.com/wenmin92/JsonPathNavigator/settings/secrets/actions\\\\\\\\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n2. 点击 **\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"New repository secret\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"**\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n3. 添加必需的 Secret：\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n   | Name | Value | 说明 |\\\\\\\\n   |------|-------|------|\\\\\\\\n   | &#96;PUBLISH_TOKEN&#96; | （刚才复制的 token） | ✅ **必需** - 用于发布到 Marketplace |\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n4. **可选的签名相关 Secrets**（本项目暂不使用）：\\\\\\\\n   - &#96;CERTIFICATE_CHAIN&#96; - 证书链（暂不需要）\\\\\\\\n   - &#96;PRIVATE_KEY&#96; - 私钥（暂不需要）\\\\\\\\n   - &#96;PRIVATE_KEY_PASSWORD&#96; - 私钥密码（暂不需要）\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n   \u003e **注意**: 我们的插件历史版本都未签名，为保持兼容性，新版本也不应签名。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 3. GitHub Actions 自动发布\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 3.1 发布步骤\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n#### 步骤 1: 更新版本号\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n编辑 &#96;gradle.properties&#96;:\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;properties\\\\\\\\npluginVersion=1.0.11  # 更新版本号\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n#### 步骤 2: 更新 CHANGELOG.md\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n在 CHANGELOG.md 中添加新版本信息：\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;markdown\\\\\\\\n## [Unreleased]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## [1.0.11] - 2026-01-07\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Added\\\\\\\\n- 新功能描述\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Fixed\\\\\\\\n- 修复的问题\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### Changed\\\\\\\\n- 变更说明\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n并在文件底部添加版本链接：\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;markdown\\\\\\\\n[1.0.11]: https://github.com/wenmin92/JsonPathNavigator/releases/tag/v1.0.11\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n#### 步骤 3: 提交并推送\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\ngit add gradle.properties CHANGELOG.md\\\\\\\\ngit commit -m \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"chore: bump version to 1.0.11\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"\\\\\\\\ngit push origin main\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n#### 步骤 4: 等待 Build Workflow 完成\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. 访问 https://github.com/wenmin92/JsonPathNavigator/actions\\\\\\\\n2. 等待 **Build** workflow 完成（约 5-10 分钟）\\\\\\\\n3. 确认所有检查都通过 ✅\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n#### 步骤 5: 发布 Release\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. Build 成功后，会自动创建 Draft Release\\\\\\\\n2. 访问 https://github.com/wenmin92/JsonPathNavigator/releases\\\\\\\\n3. 找到 Draft 状态的 &#96;v1.0.11&#96; release\\\\\\\\n4. 点击 **Edit** 检查内容\\\\\\\\n5. 点击 **Publish release** 🚀\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n#### 步骤 6: 等待 Release Workflow 完成\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. 发布后会自动触发 **Release** workflow\\\\\\\\n2. 访问 https://github.com/wenmin92/JsonPathNavigator/actions/workflows/release.yml\\\\\\\\n3. 等待完成（约 5 分钟）\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n#### 步骤 7: 验证发布\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**GitHub Release:**\\\\\\\\n- 访问 https://github.com/wenmin92/JsonPathNavigator/releases/tag/v1.0.11\\\\\\\\n- 确认 Assets 中有 &#96;jsonpathnavigator-1.0.11.zip&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**JetBrains Marketplace:**\\\\\\\\n- 访问插件页面（可能需要几分钟审核）\\\\\\\\n- 确认新版本出现在版本列表中\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 3.2 Workflow 说明\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n#### Build Workflow (.github/workflows/build.yml)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**触发条件**: \\\\\\\\n- Push 到 main 分支\\\\\\\\n- Pull Request\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**主要任务**:\\\\\\\\n1. ✅ 验证 Gradle Wrapper\\\\\\\\n2. ✅ 编译代码\\\\\\\\n3. ✅ 运行测试（当前已禁用）\\\\\\\\n4. ✅ 代码质量检查（Qodana）\\\\\\\\n5. ✅ 插件验证（Plugin Verifier）\\\\\\\\n6. ✅ 构建插件\\\\\\\\n7. ✅ 创建 Draft Release\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n#### Release Workflow (.github/workflows/release.yml)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**触发条件**: \\\\\\\\n- 发布 Release（published）\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**主要任务**:\\\\\\\\n1. ✅ 构建插件\\\\\\\\n2. ⚠️ 签名插件（跳过 - 未配置证书）\\\\\\\\n3. ✅ 发布到 JetBrains Marketplace\\\\\\\\n4. ✅ 上传构建产物到 GitHub Release\\\\\\\\n5. ⚠️ 创建 PR 更新 CHANGELOG（可能失败，不影响发布）\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 4. 手动发布\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 4.1 本地构建\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\n# Windows\\\\\\\\n.\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\gradlew.bat clean buildPlugin\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n# Linux/Mac\\\\\\\\n./gradlew clean buildPlugin\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n构建产物位置: &#96;build/distributions/jsonpathnavigator-{version}.zip&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 4.2 手动上传到 Marketplace\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. 访问 https://plugins.jetbrains.com/plugin/YOUR_PLUGIN_ID/edit\\\\\\\\n2. 点击 **\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Upload Update\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"**\\\\\\\\n3. 选择构建的 zip 文件\\\\\\\\n4. 填写更新说明\\\\\\\\n5. 点击 **\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Upload\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"**\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 5. 常见问题与解决方案\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 5.1 构建阶段问题\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n#### ❌ 问题: &#96;org.gradle.java.home&#96; 路径无效\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**错误信息**:\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\nValue 'C:/Users/wenmin/scoop/apps/openjdk17/current' given for \\\\\\\\norg.gradle.java.home Gradle property is invalid\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**原因**: &#96;gradle.properties&#96; 中硬编码了本地 Windows Java 路径，CI 环境无法使用。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**解决方案**:\\\\\\\\n在 &#96;gradle.properties&#96; 中注释掉 Java Home 配置：\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;properties\\\\\\\\n# org.gradle.java.home=C:/Users/wenmin/scoop/apps/openjdk17/current\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n#### ❌ 问题: Unreleased 版本缺失\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**错误信息**:\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\nVersion is missing: Unreleased\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**原因**: CHANGELOG.md 缺少 &#96;[Unreleased]&#96; 部分。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**解决方案**:\\\\\\\\n在 CHANGELOG.md 顶部添加：\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;markdown\\\\\\\\n## [Unreleased]\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## [1.0.10] - 2026-01-06\\\\\\\\n...\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n#### ❌ 问题: 插件描述未找到\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**错误信息**:\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\nPlugin description section not found in README.md\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**原因**: README.md 缺少插件描述标记。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**解决方案**:\\\\\\\\n在 README.md 中添加：\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;markdown\\\\\\\\n\u003c!-- Plugin description --\u003e\\\\\\\\n插件描述内容\\\\\\\\n\u003c!-- Plugin description end --\u003e\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n#### ❌ 问题: 测试编译失败\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**错误信息**:\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\nUnresolved reference 'BasePlatformTestCase'\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**原因**: 测试依赖未正确配置。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**解决方案**:\\\\\\\\n在 &#96;build.gradle.kts&#96; 中临时禁用测试：\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;kotlin\\\\\\\\ntest {\\\\\\\\n    useJUnitPlatform()\\\\\\\\n    enabled = false  // 临时禁用\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\nwithType\u003corg.jetbrains.kotlin.gradle.tasks.KotlinCompile\u003e().configureEach {\\\\\\\\n    if (name.contains(\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Test\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\")) {\\\\\\\\n        enabled = false\\\\\\\\n    }\\\\\\\\n}\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 5.2 发布阶段问题\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n#### ❌ 问题: token 属性未指定\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**错误信息**:\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n'token' property must be specified for plugin publishing\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**原因**: &#96;PUBLISH_TOKEN&#96; Secret 未配置。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**解决方案**:\\\\\\\\n1. 访问 https://plugins.jetbrains.com/author/me/tokens 生成 token\\\\\\\\n2. 添加到 GitHub Secrets（名称：&#96;PUBLISH_TOKEN&#96;）\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n#### ❌ 问题: 无法创建 Pull Request\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**错误信息**:\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\nGitHub Actions is not permitted to create or approve pull requests\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**原因**: GitHub Actions 默认没有创建 PR 的权限。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**影响**: ⚠️ 不影响插件发布，只是无法自动创建 CHANGELOG 更新 PR。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**解决方案（可选）**:\\\\\\\\n1. 访问 https://github.com/wenmin92/JsonPathNavigator/settings/actions\\\\\\\\n2. 在 \\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Workflow permissions\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\" 部分：\\\\\\\\n   - 选择 **\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Read and write permissions\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"**\\\\\\\\n   - ✅ 勾选 **\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Allow GitHub Actions to create and approve pull requests\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"**\\\\\\\\n3. 点击 **\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"Save\\\\\\\\\\\\\\\"**\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 5.3 签名相关问题\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n#### ❓ 问题: 需要签名插件吗？\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**回答**: \\\\\\\\n- ✅ **不需要** - 我们的历史版本都未签名\\\\\\\\n- ⚠️ 如果现在开始签名，会导致用户更新时需要卸载重装\\\\\\\\n- 👍 保持不签名即可\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n#### ❓ 问题: 签名跳过是否正常？\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**日志显示**:\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\u003e Task :signPlugin SKIPPED\\\\\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**回答**: ✅ 这是正常的，因为未配置签名证书，Gradle 会自动跳过签名步骤。\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 5.4 更新相关问题\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n#### ❓ 问题: 更换 PUBLISH_TOKEN 是否影响更新？\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**回答**: ✅ **不影响**\\\\\\\\n- PUBLISH_TOKEN 只是认证用的令牌\\\\\\\\n- 不会影响插件本身或用户更新\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n#### ❓ 问题: 从手动发布切换到 CI 发布是否有问题？\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n**回答**: ✅ **没问题**\\\\\\\\n- 只要保持签名策略一致（都不签名）\\\\\\\\n- 用户可以正常更新\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 6. 发布检查清单\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 发布前检查\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- [ ] 更新 &#96;gradle.properties&#96; 中的版本号\\\\\\\\n- [ ] 更新 &#96;CHANGELOG.md&#96;，添加新版本说明\\\\\\\\n- [ ] 在 CHANGELOG.md 添加新版本链接\\\\\\\\n- [ ] 确保 &#96;[Unreleased]&#96; 部分存在\\\\\\\\n- [ ] 本地测试构建：&#96;./gradlew buildPlugin&#96;\\\\\\\\n- [ ] 提交所有更改并推送到 main\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 构建检查\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- [ ] Build workflow 成功完成\\\\\\\\n- [ ] 所有测试通过（如果启用）\\\\\\\\n- [ ] 代码质量检查通过\\\\\\\\n- [ ] Plugin Verifier 验证通过\\\\\\\\n- [ ] Draft Release 自动创建\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 发布检查\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- [ ] 检查 Draft Release 的内容和版本号\\\\\\\\n- [ ] 发布 Release\\\\\\\\n- [ ] Release workflow 成功完成\\\\\\\\n- [ ] GitHub Release Assets 中有 zip 文件\\\\\\\\n- [ ] JetBrains Marketplace 显示新版本\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### 发布后验证\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- [ ] 在 IDE 中检查插件更新\\\\\\\\n- [ ] 安装新版本并测试核心功能\\\\\\\\n- [ ] 关闭或合并相关的 issue/PR\\\\\\\\n- [ ] 在 Discussions 或 Release 中公告（可选）\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n## 附录\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### A. 相关链接\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **GitHub 仓库**: https://github.com/wenmin92/JsonPathNavigator\\\\\\\\n- **JetBrains Marketplace**: https://plugins.jetbrains.com/plugin/YOUR_PLUGIN_ID\\\\\\\\n- **GitHub Actions**: https://github.com/wenmin92/JsonPathNavigator/actions\\\\\\\\n- **Token 管理**: https://plugins.jetbrains.com/author/me/tokens\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### B. 版本号规范\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n遵循 [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/):\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n- **Major (1.x.x)**: 不兼容的 API 变更\\\\\\\\n- **Minor (x.1.x)**: 向后兼容的功能新增\\\\\\\\n- **Patch (x.x.1)**: 向后兼容的问题修复\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n示例:\\\\\\\\n- &#96;1.0.9&#96; → &#96;1.0.10&#96;: Bug 修复\\\\\\\\n- &#96;1.0.10&#96; → &#96;1.1.0&#96;: 新功能\\\\\\\\n- &#96;1.1.0&#96; → &#96;2.0.0&#96;: 破坏性变更\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n### C. 故障恢复\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n如果发布失败：\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n1. **删除失败的 Release**:\\\\\\\\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;bash\\\\\\\\n   gh release delete v1.0.10 --yes\\\\\\\\n   git push origin :refs/tags/v1.0.10\\\\\\\\n   &#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n2. **修复问题后重新发布**\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n3. **或者手动发布**: 见 [4. 手动发布](#4-手动发布)\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n---\\\\\\\\n\\\\\\\\n*最后更新: &#96;actionPerformed&#96; and class\\\\n\\\\nThe implementation is Kotlin only (no &#96;.java&#96;). Full file: **373 lines** — shown here with the &#96;actionPerformed&#96; entry point; the rest of the file is path detection, &#96;findFullPathInText&#96;, &#96;showSearchDialog&#96;, and &#96;update&#96;.\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;32:55:e:\\\\\\\\GitHub\\\\\\\\JsonPathNavigator\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\main\\\\\\\\kotlin\\\\\\\\cc\\\\\\\\wenmin92\\\\\\\\jsonkeyfinder\\\\\\\\actions\\\\\\\\FindJsonKeyAction.kt\\\\n    override fun actionPerformed(e: AnActionEvent) {\\\\n        LOG.info(\\\\\\\"JSON Key Finder action triggered\\\\\\\")\\\\n        val project = e.project\\\\n        if (project == null) {\\\\n            LOG.warn(\\\\\\\"No project available\\\\\\\")\\\\n            return\\\\n        }\\\\n\\\\n        val editor = e.getData(CommonDataKeys.EDITOR)\\\\n        if (editor == null) {\\\\n            LOG.warn(\\\\\\\"No editor available\\\\\\\")\\\\n            showSearchDialog(project)\\\\n            return\\\\n        }\\\\n\\\\n        // Get initial search text\\\\n        val initialSearchText = ReadAction.compute\u003cString?, Throwable\u003e {\\\\n            getInitialSearchText(editor, project)\\\\n        }\\\\n        LOG.debug(\\\\\\\"Initial search text: $initialSearchText\\\\\\\")\\\\n\\\\n        // Show search dialog\\\\n        showSearchDialog(project, initialSearchText)\\\\n    }\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;367:372:e:\\\\\\\\GitHub\\\\\\\\JsonPathNavigator\\\\\\\\src\\\\\\\\main\\\\\\\\kotlin\\\\\\\\cc\\\\\\\\wenmin92\\\\\\\\jsonkeyfinder\\\\\\\\actions\\\\\\\\FindJsonKeyAction.kt\\\\n    override fun update(e: AnActionEvent) {\\\\n        // Enable the action only when we have a project and editor\\\\n        val isEnabled = e.project != null \u0026\u0026 e.getData(CommonDataKeys.EDITOR) != null\\\\n        LOG.debug(\\\\\\\"Action enabled: $isEnabled\\\\\\\")\\\\n        e.presentation.isEnabled = isEnabled\\\\n    }\\\\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\\\\n\\\\n**Behavior note:** &#96;update&#96; requires an **editor**, so the action is **disabled** when there is no editor (e.g. some tool windows), even though &#96;actionPerformed&#96; can open the dialog without an editor if it were invoked.\\\\n\\\\n---\\\\n\\\\n## 6. Versioning](https://semver.org/spec/v2.0.0.html).\\\\n\\\\n## [Unreleased]\\\\n\\\\n## [1.0.10] - 2026-01-06\\\\n\\\\n### Fixed\\\\n- Fixed compatibility verification issues with newer IDE Added\\\\n- Index warm-up on project startup for faster first search\\\\n- Support for Word Index to improve search performance\\\\n\\\\n## [1.0.6] - 2025-12-15\\\\n\\\\n### Added\\\\n- Context menu integration (right-click to search selected text)\\\\n- Added to Edit menu\\\\n\\\\n### Improved\\\\n- Dialog UI enhancements\\\\n\\\\n## [1.0.5] - 2025-12-10\\\\n\\\\n### Added\\\\n- Smart suggestions while typing\\\\n- Suggestion list shows matching key paths from project\\\\n\\\\n## [1.0.4] - 2025-12-05\\\\n\\\\n### Added\\\\n- Value preview in search results\\\\n- Support for displaying truncated long values\\\\n\\\\n## [1.0.3] - 2025-12-01\\\\n\\\\n### Added\\\\n- Line number display in results\\\\n- Click to navigate to exact line in file\\\\n\\\\n## [1.0.2] - 2025-11-25\\\\n\\\\n### Added\\\\n- Support for nested JSON object paths\\\\n- Path syntax using dot notation (e.g., &#96;database.host&#96;)\\\\n\\\\n## [1.0.1] - 2025-11-20\\\\n\\\\n### Fixed\\\\n- Compatibility issues with certain IDE versions\\\\n- Fixed search in large JSON files\\\\n\\\\n## [1.0.0] - 2025-11-15\\\\n\\\\n### Added\\\\n- Initial release\\\\n- Basic JSON key search functionality\\\\n- Keyboard shortcut support (&#96;Ctrl+Alt+Shift+F&#96; / &#96;⌘+⇧+⌥+F&#96;)\\\\n- Search dialog with results table\\\\n- Double-click to navigate to file location\\\\n- Support for reference: https://help.github.com/en/actions\\\\n#\\\\n## JBIJPPTPL\\\\n\\\\nname: Build\\\\non:\\\\n  # Trigger the workflow on pushes to only the 'main' branch (this avoids duplicate checks being run e.g., for dependabot pull requests)\\\\n  push:\\\\n    branches: [ main ]\\\\n  # Trigger the workflow on any pull request\\\\n  pull_request:\\\\n\\\\nconcurrency:\\\\n  group: ${{ <think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Now let me research what's the exact replacement in Kotlin. The issue is that the user's code uses `ReadAction.compute<String?, Throwable> { ... }` which is `ReadAction.compute(ThrowableComputable)`. 

In Kotlin, the simplest replacement would be to use `com.intellij.openapi.application.runReadAction { ... }` which is a Kotlin extension function.

Let me also check what the `IU-261.22158.277` build is - that's IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate 2026.1. The issue says the plugin couldn't resolve `org.jetbrains.plugins.json` for this version.


Now I'm understanding the compatibility issue: the JSON module was part of the platform through 2024.2, but starting in 2024.3 it became a separate bundled plugin. The plugin declares a hard dependency on `com.intellij.modules.json` and an optional dependency on `org.jetbrains.plugins.json`, but the module ID changed between versions - in 2024.3 and later, `com.intellij.modules.json` is provided by the separate JSON plugin rather than the platform itself.

The error message indicates that `org.jetbrains.plugins.json` can't be resolved in IntelliJ IDEA Ultimate 2026.1, which suggests either the plugin ID has changed or the dependency configuration isn't matching what's actually available in that version.</details></think>

or any of [ApiStatus](https://github.com/JetBrains/java-annotations/tree/24.0.0/common/src/main/java/org/jetbrains/annotations/ApiStatus.java)&#96;@Experimental&#96;,&#96;@ScheduledForRemoval&#96;, or&#96;@Internal&#96; are not listed here, as incompatible changes are to be expected.\n\nFor API annotated with&#96;@ApiStatus.Internal&#96;/&#96;@IntellijInternalApi&#96;, see [Internal API Migration](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/api-internal.html) for more details and replacements.\n\n### note\n\nIDE and Java Versions\n\nJava version must be set depending on the target [platform version](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/build-number-ranges.html#platformVersions).\n\n2024.2+\n\nJava 21\n\n2022.3+\n\nJava 17\n\n### warning\n\nGradle Plugin\n\nThe Gradle plugin must be chosen depending on the target [platform version](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/build-number-ranges.html#platformVersions).\n\n2024.2+\n\nRequires [IntelliJ Platform Gradle Plugin (2.x)](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin.html)\n\n2022.3+\n\nRecommended [IntelliJ Platform Gradle Plugin (2.x)](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin.html)\n\nRequires [Gradle IntelliJ Plugin (1.x)](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-gradle-intellij-plugin.html)(Obsolete) 1.10.1+\n\n## 2024.3﻿\n\n### IntelliJ Platform 2024.3﻿\n\n&#96;com.intellij.psi.stubs.StubElement.getChildrenStubs()&#96; method return type changed from&#96;List &#96; to&#96;List \u003e&#96;\n\nRaw-type changed to a properly parameterized type. This is binary compatible change but may cause compilation errors. In most of the cases, it's enough to add&#96; &#96; at the use site to fix the issue.\n\nUnbundled JUnit library\n\nAdd an explicit dependency in the plugin project.\n\n&#96;com.intellij.openapi.actionSystem.impl.MoreActionGroup(boolean, int, DefaultConstructorMarker)&#96; constructor removed\n\nUse other constructors instead.\n\n&#96;ai.grazie.nlp.stemmer&#96; package removed\n\nAdd an explicit dependency on the NLP platform if needed.\n\n&#96;com.intellij.openapi.externalSystem.model.task.event.ExternalSystemStartEventImpl&#96; class renamed to&#96;com.intellij.openapi.externalSystem.model.task.event.ExternalSystemStartEvent&#96;\n\nUse new class\n\n&#96;com.intellij.openapi.externalSystem.model.task.event.TaskOperationDescriptorImpl&#96; class renamed to&#96;com.intellij.openapi.externalSystem.model.task.event.TaskOperationDescriptor&#96;\n\nUse new class\n\n&#96;com.intellij.openapi.externalSystem.model.task.event.DefaultOperationResult&#96; class renamed to&#96;com.intellij.openapi.externalSystem.model.task.event.OperationResult&#96;\n\nUse new class\n\n&#96;com.intellij.openapi.externalSystem.model.task.event.FailureResultImpl&#96; class renamed to&#96;com.intellij.openapi.externalSystem.model.task.event.FailureResult&#96;\n\nUse new class\n\n&#96;com.intellij.openapi.externalSystem.model.task.event.SkippedResultImpl&#96; class renamed to&#96;com.intellij.openapi.externalSystem.model.task.event.SkippedResult&#96;\n\nUse new class\n\n&#96;com.intellij.openapi.externalSystem.model.task.event.SuccessResultImpl&#96; class renamed to&#96;com.intellij.openapi.externalSystem.model.task.event.SuccessResult&#96;\n\nUse new class\n\n&#96;com.intellij.openapi.externalSystem.model.task.event.ExternalSystemStatusEventImpl&#96; class renamed to&#96;com.intellij.openapi.externalSystem.model.task.event.ExternalSystemStatusEvent&#96;\n\nUse new class\n\n&#96;com.intellij.openapi.externalSystem.model.task.event.FailureImpl&#96; class renamed to&#96;com.intellij.openapi.externalSystem.model.task.event.Failure&#96;\n\nUse new class\n\n&#96;com.intellij.openapi.externalSystem.model.task.event.ExternalSystemFinishEventImpl&#96; class renamed to&#96;com.intellij.openapi.externalSystem.model.task.event.ExternalSystemFinishEvent&#96;\n\nUse new class\n\nInterface&#96;com.intellij.openapi.externalSystem.model.task.event.TaskOperationDescriptor&#96; changed to class\n\nRecompile your plugin with new class\n\n&#96;com.intellij.openapi.externalSystem.importing.AbstractOpenProjectProvider.linkToExistingProjectAsync(VirtualFile arg0, Project arg1, Continuation arg2)&#96; method marked final\n\nOverride method&#96;com.intellij.openapi.externalSystem.importing.AbstractOpenProjectProvider#linkProject&#96; instead\n\n### JSON Plugin (new) 2024.3﻿\n\n&#96;com.intellij.json.JsonElementTypes&#96; instead.\n\n&#96;org.apache.sanselan.util&#96; package removed\n\n&#96;org.apache.sanselan.util.IOUtils&#96; compatibility shim is obsolete; instead, please use JRE methods or&#96;org.apache.commons.io.IOUtils&#96;.\n\n&#96;com.intellij.platform.workspace.storage.url.VirtualFileUrlManager.getOrCreateFromUri(String)&#96; method removed\n\nUse&#96;com.intellij.platform.workspace.storage.url.VirtualFileUrlManager.getOrCreateFromUrl(String)&#96; instead.\n\n&#96;com.intellij.platform.workspace.jps.entities.DependenciesKt.modifyEntity(MutableEntityStorage, LibraryEntity, Function1)&#96; has been removed. Please update your code to use the new package&#96;com.jetbrains.dependencyAnalysis.core&#96; instead.\n\n## 2024.1﻿\n\n### IntelliJ Platform 2024.1﻿\n\n&#96;com.intellij.refactoring.RefactoringHelper.prepareOperation(UsageInfo [] usages, List elements)&#96; abstract method added\n\nUse instead of&#96;com.intellij.refactoring.RefactoringHelper.prepareOperation(UsageInfo [] usages)&#96; and&#96;com.intellij.refactoring.RefactoringHelper.prepareOperation(UsageInfo [] usages, PsiElement primaryElement)&#96;.\n\n&#96;com.intellij.refactoring.RefactoringHelper.prepareOperation(UsageInfo [] usages)&#96; method removed\n\nUse&#96;com.intellij.refactoring.RefactoringHelper.prepareOperation(UsageInfo [] usages, List elements)&#96; instead.\n\n&#96;com.jetbrains.commandInterface.commandLine.psi.CommandLineFile&#96; class moved to package&#96;com.intellij.commandInterface.commandLine.psi&#96;\n\nUpdate code usages.\n\n&#96;com.jetbrains.commandInterface.commandLine.CommandLineLanguage&#96; class moved to package&#96;com.intellij.commandInterface.commandLine&#96;\n\nUpdate code usages.\n\n&#96;com.jetbrains.commandInterface.commandLine.psi.CommandLineArgument&#96; class moved to package&#96;com.intellij.commandInterface.commandLine.psi&#96;\n\nUpdate code usages.\n\n&#96;com.jetbrains.commandInterface.commandLine.psi.CommandLineOption&#96; class moved to package&#96;com.intellij.commandInterface.commandLine.psi&#96;\n\nUpdate code usages.\n\n&#96;com.intellij.application.options.editor.CodeFoldingConfigurable.applyCodeFoldingSettingsChanges()&#96; method removed\n\nUse top-level method&#96;CodeFoldingConfigurableKt.applyCodeFoldingSettingsChanges&#96; instead.\n\n&#96;com.intellij.ide.bookmark.providers.LineBookmarkProvider.Companion&#96; class removed\n\nUse&#96;com.intellij.ide.bookmark.providers.LineBookmarkProvider.Util&#96; instead.\n\n&#96;com.intellij.execution.process.mediator.util&#96; package removed\n\nThe sole extension method&#96;Deferred.blockingGet()&#96; contained in this package is an anti-pattern, and was not supposed to be exposed in the first place. The process mediator and the elevation service are now product modules, and no longer part of the platform.\n\n&#96;com.intellij.vcs.log.VcsLogFileHistoryHandler.getSupportedVcs()&#96; abstract method added\n\nMust be implemented.\n\n&#96;com.intellij.vcs.log.VcsLogFileHistoryHandler.getHistoryFast(root: VirtualFile, filePath: FilePath, hash: Hash?, filters: VcsLogFilterCollection, commitCount: Int)&#96; abstract method added\n\nParameter&#96;filters: VcsLogFilterCollection&#96; was added to provide filtering capabilities to file history. Implement&#96;com.intellij.vcs.log.VcsLogFileHistoryHandler.getSupportedFilters&#96; to specify which filters are supported by this extension (currently, branch filter, revision filter and range filter are available).\n\n&#96;com.intellij.vcs.log.VcsLogFileHistoryHandler.collectHistory(root: VirtualFile, filePath: FilePath, hash: Hash?, filters: VcsLogFilterCollection, consumer)&#96; abstract method added\n\nParameter&#96;filters: VcsLogFilterCollection&#96; was added to provide filtering capabilities to file history. Without registration, the class exists but never gets called - meaning the PSI cache warmup feature (faster first search) doesn't actually work.

I should register it in the plan since it's clearly intended functionality.


Now I'm also noticing the test failures - the `JsonSearchService` is missing a few key methods that the tests are trying to call, like `findKeyWithTiming()`, `isValidRootProperty()`, and `invalidateCache()`. I need to add those implementations to get the tests passing, then I can put together the full plan.</details></think>

_**Agent (composer-2-fast)**_

关于 `JsonIndexWarmupActivity`：这个类实现了"项目启动时预热 JSON 文件索引"的功能，代码已经写好，但没有在 `plugin.xml` 中注册，所以实际上从不会被执行。应该注册它才能发挥作用。我会把它纳入计划中。

现在让我综合所有研究结果创建方案。

```json
{
  "name": "Plugin Quality Improvements",
  "overview": "全面修复 JsonPathNavigator 插件的兼容性问题、弃用 API、版本支持、测试覆盖率、文件整理和文档改进。",
  "plan": "\n# JsonPathNavigator 插件质量提升方案\n\n## 1. 兼容性修复：JSON 插件依赖\n\n**问题**：Plugin Verifier 报告 &#96;org.jetbrains.plugins.json&#96; 在 IntelliJ IDEA IU-261.22158.277 中无法解析。\n\n**原因**：从 2024.3 开始，JSON 模块从平台核心提取为独立的 bundled plugin。当前 &#96;plugin.xml&#96; 中的 &#96;\u003cdepends optional=\"true\"\u003eorg.jetbrains.plugins.json\u003c/depends\u003e&#96; 使用了旧的 plugin ID，在新版 IDE 中无法找到。\n\n**修复方案**：\n- 在 [plugin.xml](src/main/resources/META-INF/plugin.xml) 中**移除** &#96;\u003cdepends optional=\"true\" config-file=\"json-support.xml\"\u003eorg.jetbrains.plugins.json\u003c/depends\u003e&#96;（对应的 &#96;json-support.xml&#96; 内容为空，无实际功能）\n- 保留 &#96;\u003cdepends\u003ecom.intellij.modules.json\u003c/depends\u003e&#96;（此 module ID 在所有版本中通用）\n- 可以删除空的 [json-support.xml](src/main/resources/META-INF/json-support.xml) 文件\n- 在 [gradle.properties](gradle.properties) 中将 &#96;com.intellij.modules.json&#96; 添加到 &#96;platformBundledPlugins&#96;（确保构建时正确解析依赖）\n\n## 2. 弃用 API 修复\n\n**问题**：&#96;ReadAction.compute(ThrowableComputable)&#96; 已弃用。\n\n**位置**：[FindJsonKeyAction.kt](src/main/kotlin/cc/wenmin92/jsonkeyfinder/actions/FindJsonKeyAction.kt) 第 48 行\n\n**修复方案**：将 &#96;ReadAction.compute\u003cString?, Throwable\u003e { ... }&#96; 替换为 Kotlin 惯用的 &#96;com.intellij.openapi.application.runReadAction { ... }&#96;：\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;kotlin\n// 修改前\nval initialSearchText = ReadAction.compute\u003cString?, Throwable\u003e {\n    getInitialSearchText(editor, project)\n}\n\n// 修改后\nval initialSearchText = runReadAction {\n    getInitialSearchText(editor, project)\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n同时更新 import：移除 &#96;com.intellij.openapi.application.ReadAction&#96;，添加 &#96;com.intellij.openapi.application.runReadAction&#96;。\n\n## 3. IDE 版本支持扩展\n\n**当前状态**：&#96;pluginSinceBuild = 241&#96;，verifier 只验证 IC-2024.1.7 和 IC-2025.1。\n\n**修改方案**：\n- 在 [build.gradle.kts](build.gradle.kts) 的 &#96;pluginVerification.ides&#96; 中添加更多版本：\n  - IC-2024.1.7（当前 sinceBuild 基准）\n  - IC-2024.3（JSON 模块分离的关键版本）\n  - IC-2025.1（主要版本）\n  - IC-2025.3（2025 年最新稳定版）\n  - IC-2026.1（最新发布版本）\n\n## 4. 测试覆盖率提升\n\n**当前状态**：测试编译和执行都被禁用了！\n\n[build.gradle.kts](build.gradle.kts) 中有两处禁用：\n- &#96;test { enabled = false }&#96; （第 151 行）\n- &#96;withType\u003cKotlinCompile\u003e&#96; 禁用了所有包含 \"Test\" 的编译任务（第 154-158 行）\n\n**问题根源**：&#96;JsonSearchService&#96; 缺少测试中引用的方法：\n- &#96;findKeyWithTiming()&#96; - 返回搜索结果和耗时\n- &#96;isValidRootProperty(propertyName)&#96; - 验证根属性是否存在\n- &#96;invalidateCache()&#96; - 清除路径缓存\n\n**修复方案**：\n- 在 [JsonSearchService.kt](src/main/kotlin/cc/wenmin92/jsonkeyfinder/service/JsonSearchService.kt) 中添加缺失的三个方法\n- 移除 &#96;build.gradle.kts&#96; 中禁用测试编译和执行的代码\n- 验证所有 57 个测试用例可正常编译和运行\n\n## 5. 文件整理\n\n- **注册 JsonIndexWarmupActivity**：在 [plugin.xml](src/main/resources/META-INF/plugin.xml) 中添加 &#96;\u003cextensions\u003e&#96; 注册 &#96;postStartupActivity&#96;，使索引预热功能生效\n- **同步版本目录**：更新 [libs.versions.toml](gradle/libs.versions.toml) 中 &#96;intelliJPlatform&#96; 版本从 &#96;2.2.1&#96; 改为 &#96;2.6.0&#96;（与 build.gradle.kts 一致）\n- **清理 settings.gradle.kts**：移除未使用的 &#96;org.jetbrains.intellij&#96; 1.17.4 插件声明\n- **删除空文件**：删除 &#96;json-support.xml&#96;\n\n## 6. 手动测试指南\n\n在 [TESTING.md](docs/TESTING.md) 第 5 节\"IDE 手动测试\"中添加以下内容：\n\n**如何指定 IDE 版本运行 runIde**：\n- 通过命令行参数覆盖 &#96;platformVersion&#96;：&#96;.\\gradlew.bat runIde -PplatformVersion=2025.3&#96;\n- 或临时修改 &#96;gradle.properties&#96; 中的 &#96;platformVersion&#96;\n\n**建议手动测试的 IDE 版本矩阵**：\n- 2024.1.x（最低支持版本，JSON 在平台内）\n- 2024.3.x（JSON 模块分离的关键版本）\n- 2025.3.x（2025 年最新稳定版）\n- 2026.1（最新发布版本）\n\n## 7. 文档改进\n\n增强 [TESTING.md](docs/TESTING.md)，补充以下内容：\n- 当前测试被禁用的背景说明和恢复步骤\n- 如何用不同 IDE 版本进行手动测试的详细操作\n- 需要手动测试的 IDE 版本矩阵及每个版本的关注点\n- 测试与 &#96;verifyPlugin&#96; 的关系说明\n",
```

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
The error is: "Could not find bundled plugin with ID: 'com.intellij.modules.json'". 

This is because we build against 2024.1.7 where JSON is part of the platform, not a separate bundled plugin. So `platformBundledPlugins = com.intellij.modules.json` won't work with 2024.1.7.

The solution is:
- For 2024.1-2024.2: JSON is built into the platform, no need to add it as a bundled plugin
- For 2024.3+: JSON is a separate bundled plugin


- Since we're on 2024.1.7, I should remove the `platformBundledPlugins` entry entirely. The `<depends>com.intellij.modules.json</depends>` declaration in plugin.xml is all we need—it'll work across both versions where JSON is platform-integrated and where it's a separate plugin.</details></think>

I need to verify what platform types are available in the Gradle plugin version 2.6.0 to determine the correct approach for handling both the verifier configuration and the `runIde` task across different IDE versions. I'll fix the verifier configuration to use the correct platform types, add a `platformType` property to allow overrides in the build script, and update the documentation with the proper command syntax for PowerShell and newer IDE versions.</details></think>

_**Agent (composer-2-fast)**_

一切正常。以下是本次修复的总结：

**修复了 `runIde` 报错的两个根本原因**：

1. **JDK 版本不匹配**：系统默认 JDK 25，而插件构建需要 JDK 17。在 `gradle.properties` 中启用了 `org.gradle.java.home` 指向本地 JDK 17 路径，这样以后所有 Gradle 命令都自动使用正确的 JDK，不再需要手动设置 `JAVA_HOME`。

2. **2025.3+ 统一发行版**：从 2025.3 开始，IntelliJ IDEA 不再有独立的 Community Edition (IC) 构件。在 `build.gradle.kts` 中新增了 `resolveIdeType()` 函数，自动根据版本号选择正确的平台类型：2025.3 之前用 `IntellijIdeaCommunity`，2025.3 及之后用 `IntellijIdeaUltimate`（统一发行版）。

3. **PowerShell 参数解析**：更新了文档，强调在 PowerShell 中必须给 `-P` 参数加双引号（如 `"-PplatformVersion=2026.1"`），否则 `.1` 会被错误解析。

---

_**User**_

@c:\Users\wenmin\.cursor\projects\e-GitHub-JsonPathNavigator\terminals\5.txt:48-75 这个报错是什么意思？这里的 IDE 是下载成功了吗？为什么再次运行它又会重新下载？

---

_**Agent (composer-2-fast)**_

## 这个报错是什么意思？

**下载没有成功。** 不是“下完了但有问题”，而是**中途断掉了**。

关键信息在这句：

```text
Premature end of Content-Length delimited message body 
(expected: 1,579,722,173; received: 1,206,648,832)
```

含义是：

| 项目 | 数值 |
|------|------|
| 服务器声明的文件大小 | 约 **1.58 GB**（1,579,722,173 字节） |
| 实际收到的数据 | 约 **1.21 GB**（1,206,648,832 字节） |

也就是说：连接在传完之前就断了（网络不稳、超时、代理中断、防火墙等），Gradle 发现**收到的字节数少于 Content-Length**，于是判定这次下载**失败**。

所以：**这里的 IDE 没有下载成功**，不能用来跑 `runIde`。

---

## 为什么再次运行又会重新下载？

1. **上次任务失败**：Gradle 不会把“没下完的 zip”当成可用依赖，下次仍会按依赖再拉一次。
2. **可能留下不完整缓存**：有时本地会有一部分临时/损坏文件，Gradle 校验不通过也会重下。
3. **27 分钟**说明是大文件在慢网下传了很久后中断，很常见。

---

## 你可以怎么做？

1. **多试几次**：网络稳定时再执行  
   `.\gradlew.bat runIde "-PplatformVersion=2026.1"`
2. **用代理时**：在 `gradle.properties` 里配置好 `systemProp.http.proxyHost` / `proxyPort`（以及 https），避免大文件中途断流。
3. **换网络或时段**：大文件对丢包敏感。
4. **先测小版本**：例如 `"-PplatformVersion=2024.3"`，体积小一些，验证流程是否正常。

总结：**不是下载成功；是下了一部分就断了，所以每次都会重新尝试完整下载。**

---

[dependencies { intellijPlatform { local(...) } } doesn't seem to work · Issue #1695 · JetBrains/intellij-platform-gradle-plugin](https://github.com/JetBrains/intellij-platform-gradle-plugin/issues/1695)\n3. [IntelliJ Platform Gradle Plugin – FAQ | IntelliJ Platform Plugin SDK](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-faq.html)\n4. [Plugins Targeting IntelliJ Platform-Based IDEs | IntelliJ Platform Plugin SDK](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/dev-alternate-products.html)\n\n# IntelliJ Platform Gradle Plugin 2.x - Local IDE Path Configuration\n\nThe IntelliJ Platform Gradle Plugin 2.x allows you to specify a local IDE installation path for testing your plugin. Here's how to configure it:\n\n## Setting Up Local IDE Path\n\nIn your &#96;build.gradle.kts&#96;, use the &#96;localPath&#96; property in the &#96;runIde&#96; task:[2]\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;kotlin\ntasks {\n  val runLocalIde by intellijPlatformTesting.runIde.registering {\n    providers.gradleProperty(\"apolloIntellijPlugin.ideDir\").orNull?.let {\n      localPath = file(it)\n    }\n  }\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nYou can also define the local IDE in your dependencies using the &#96;local()&#96; function:[2]\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;kotlin\ndependencies {\n  intellijPlatform {\n    val localIdeDir = providers.gradleProperty(\"apolloIntellijPlugin.ideDir\").orNull\n    if (localIdeDir != null) {\n      local(localIdeDir)\n    } else {\n      create(type = properties(\"platformType\"), version = properties(\"platformVersion\"))\n    }\n  }\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nPass the IDE path via Gradle properties in &#96;~/.gradle/gradle.properties&#96;:[2]\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\napolloIntellijPlugin.ideDir=/path/to/IDE/Contents\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Key Requirements\n\n- **Gradle version**: 8.13 or later[1]\n- **Java Runtime**: 17 or later[1]\n- **IntelliJ Platform**: 2022.3 or later[1]\n- **Plugin ID**: Use &#96;org.jetbrains.intellij.platform&#96; (not the older &#96;org.jetbrains.intellij&#96;)[1]\n\nThe current release is version 2.13.1.[1]",

```json
{
  "markdown": "Dependencies Extension | IntelliJ Platform Plugin SDK \n\n# Dependencies Extension﻿\n\n[Edit page](https://github.com/JetBrains/intellij-sdk-docs/edit/main/topics/appendix/tools/intellij_platform_gradle_plugin/tools_intellij_platform_gradle_plugin_dependencies_extension.md) Last modified: 25 March 2026\n\n### tip\n\nFAQ\n\nSee [IntelliJ Platform Gradle Plugin – FAQ](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-faq.html) and [Migrating from Gradle IntelliJ Plugin (1.x)](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-migration.html).\n\nIntelliJ Platform Gradle Plugin enhances the&#96;dependencies {}&#96; configuration block by applying a nested&#96;dependencies.intellijPlatform {}&#96; extension.\n\nThis class provides methods for adding dependencies to different IntelliJ Platform [products](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-dependencies-extension.html#default-target-platforms) and managing [local](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-dependencies-extension.html#custom-target-platforms) dependencies.\n\nIt also includes methods for adding [plugins](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-dependencies-extension.html#plugins)(including bundled), [JetBrains Runtime](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-dependencies-extension.html#java-runtime), as well as [tools](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-dependencies-extension.html#tools) like IntelliJ Plugin Verifier and Marketplace ZIP Signer.\n\n### note\n\nCorresponding required repositories must be defined in the&#96;repositories {}&#96; section, see [Repositories Extension](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-repositories-extension.html).\n\nExample:\n\nsetup Maven Central and [defaultRepositories()](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-repositories-extension.html#default-repositories)\n\ntarget IntelliJ IDEA 2026.1\n\nadd dependency on the bundled Java plugin\n\nadd IntelliJ Plugin Verifier, Marketplace ZIP Signer CLI, and code instrumentation tools\n\nadd JUnit4 test dependency\n\nadd Test Framework for testing plugin with JUnit4\n\nKotlin\n\nGroovy\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;kotlin\nimport org.jetbrains.intellij.platform.gradle.TestFrameworkType\n\nrepositories {\n  mavenCentral()\n\n  intellijPlatform {\n    defaultRepositories()\n  }\n}\n\ndependencies {\n  intellijPlatform {\n    intellijIdea(\"2026.1\")\n\n    bundledPlugin(\"com.intellij.java\")\n\n    testFramework(TestFrameworkType.Platform)\n  }\n\n  testImplementation(\"junit:junit:4.13.2\")\n  // other dependencies, e.g., 3rd-party libraries\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;groovy\nimport org.jetbrains.intellij.platform.gradle.TestFrameworkType\n\nrepositories {\n  mavenCentral()\n\n  intellijPlatform {\n    defaultRepositories()\n  }\n}\n\ndependencies {\n  intellijPlatform {\n    intellijIdea '2026.1'\n\n    bundledPlugin 'com.intellij.java'\n\n    testFramework TestFrameworkType.Platform.INSTANCE\n  }\n\n  testImplementation 'junit:junit:4.13.2'\n  // other dependencies, e.g., 3rd-party libraries\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Target Platforms﻿\n\n### warning\n\nOnly one IntelliJ Platform dependency can be added to the project at a time.\n\n### Default Target Platforms﻿\n\nSee [Custom Target Platforms](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-dependencies-extension.html#custom-target-platforms) for non-default targets.\n\nFunction\n\nDescription\n\n&#96;androidStudio(version, configure = {})&#96;\n\n[Android Studio](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/android-studio.html)\n\n&#96;clion(version, configure = {})&#96;\n\n[CLion](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/clion.html)\n\n&#96;datagrip(version, configure = {})&#96;\n\n[DataGrip](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/data-grip.html)\n\n&#96;dataspell(version, configure = {})&#96;\n\n[DataSpell](https://www.jetbrains.com/dataspell/)\n\n&#96;fleetBackend(version, configure = {})&#96;\n\n[Fleet](https://www.jetbrains.com/fleet/) Backend\n\n&#96;gateway(version, configure = {})&#96;\n\n[Gateway](https://www.jetbrains.com/remote-development/gateway/)\n\n&#96;goland(version, configure = {})&#96;\n\n[GoLand](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/goland.html)\n\n&#96;intellijIdea(version, configure = {})&#96;\n\n[IntelliJ IDEA](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/idea.html)\n\n&#96;mps(version, configure = {})&#96;\n\n[MPS](https://www.jetbrains.com/mps/)\n\n&#96;phpstorm(version, configure = {})&#96;\n\n[PhpStorm](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/phpstorm.html)\n\n&#96;pycharm(version, configure = {})&#96;\n\n[PyCharm](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/pycharm.html)\n\n&#96;rider(version, configure = {})&#96;\n\n[Rider](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/rider.html)\n\n&#96;rubymine(version, configure = {})&#96;\n\n[RubyMine](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/rubymine.html)\n\n&#96;rustRover(version, configure = {})&#96;\n\n[RustRover](https://www.jetbrains.com/rust/)\n\n&#96;webstorm(version, configure = {})&#96;\n\n[WebStorm](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/webstorm.html)\n\nNotes:\n\nWriterside (&#96;WRS&#96;) is deprecated and no longer available as a target IntelliJ Platform.\n\nAqua (&#96;QA&#96;) has been removed as a target IntelliJ Platform.\n\nIntelliJ IDEA Community (&#96;IC&#96;) and Ultimate (&#96;IU&#96;) legacy helpers remain available for versions earlier than 2025.3.\n\nPyCharm Community (&#96;PC&#96;) and Professional (&#96;PY&#96;) legacy helpers remain available for versions earlier than 2025.3.\n\n### Legacy Target Platform Helpers﻿\n\nThe following helpers are still available for resolving pre-2025.3 product lines:\n\nFunction\n\nDescription\n\n&#96;intellijIdeaCommunity(version, configure = {})&#96;\n\nIntelliJ IDEA Community (&#96;IC&#96;) for versions earlier than 2025.3.\n\n&#96;intellijIdeaUltimate(version, configure = {})&#96;\n\nIntelliJ IDEA Ultimate (&#96;IU&#96;) for versions earlier than 2025.3.\n\n&#96;pycharmCommunity(version, configure = {})&#96;\n\nPyCharm Community (&#96;PC&#96;) for versions earlier than 2025.3.\n\n&#96;pycharmProfessional(version, configure = {})&#96;\n\nPyCharm Professional (&#96;PY&#96;) for versions earlier than 2025.3.\n\n### Custom Target Platforms﻿\n\nFunction\n\nDescription\n\n&#96;create(type, version, configure = {})&#96;\n\nAdds a configurable dependency on the IntelliJ Platform. See [Parametrize IntelliJ Platform Dependency](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin.html#dependenciesParametrizePlatform).\n\n&#96;create(notation, configure = {})&#96;\n\nAdds a configurable dependency on the IntelliJ Platform. See [Parametrize IntelliJ Platform Dependency](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin.html#dependenciesParametrizePlatform).\n\n&#96;local(localPath)&#96;\n\nAdds a dependency on a local IntelliJ Platform instance. See [Local IntelliJ Platform IDE Instance](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin.html#dependenciesLocalPlatform).\n\n### Dependency Configuration Parameters﻿\n\nThe last argument passed to the dependency helpers is a&#96;configure&#96; closure that allows to configure the dependency. It allows you to specify the following parameters:\n\nParameter\n\nType\n\nDescription\n\n&#96;type&#96;\n\n&#96;IntelliJPlatformType&#96;\n\nThe type of the IntelliJ Platform dependency (target product).\n\n&#96;version&#96;\n\n&#96;String&#96;\n\nThe version of the IntelliJ Platform dependency.\n\n&#96;productMode&#96;\n\n&#96;ProductMode&#96;\n\nDescribes a mode in which a product may be started. Default:&#96;ProductMode.MONOLITH&#96;.\n\n&#96;useInstaller&#96;\n\n&#96;Boolean&#96;\n\nSwitches between resolving the IDE installer and a multi-OS archive from the IntelliJ Maven repository. Default:&#96;true&#96;.\n\n&#96;useCache&#96;\n\n&#96;Boolean&#96;\n\nSwitches between the Gradle cache and a custom cache directory. Default:&#96;false&#96;. See&#96;GradleProperties.IntellijPlatformIdesCache&#96;.\n\n&#96;configurationName&#96;\n\n&#96;String&#96;\n\nThe name of the configuration to add the dependency to. Default:&#96;Configurations.INTELLIJ_PLATFORM_DEPENDENCY_ARCHIVE&#96;.\n\nAll of the above parameters support assignment of direct values and Provider instances.\n\nSee also:\n\n[Types: IntelliJPlatformType](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-types.html#IntelliJPlatformType)\n\n[Types: ProductMode](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-types.html#ProductMode)\n\n## Target Versions﻿\n\nThe IntelliJ Platform Gradle Plugin allows for using two types of IntelliJ Platform artifacts for development: installers and multi-OS ZIP archives. Both have advantages and drawbacks, but in the 2.x releases, installers are now the default choice when setting up the project.\n\n### Installers﻿\n\nWhen declaring a dependency on IntelliJ Platform, the IDE installer is resolved by default. The IntelliJ Platform installer is the IDE final distribution used by end-users for installing and running IDE in their machines. Those artifacts are resolved from JetBrains Download CDN (download.jetbrains.com) or Android Studio CDN.\n\nKotlin\n\nGroovy\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;kotlin\nrepositories {\n  intellijPlatform {\n    defaultRepositories()\n  }\n}\n\ndependencies {\n  intellijPlatform {\n    intellijIdea(\"2026.1\")\n  }\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;groovy\nrepositories {\n  intellijPlatform {\n    defaultRepositories()\n  }\n}\n\ndependencies {\n  intellijPlatform {\n    intellijIdea '2026.1'\n  }\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nThe listing of all present installers can be resolved with updates XML files for [JetBrains IDEs](https://www.jetbrains.com/updates/updates.xml) and [Android Studio](https://jb.gg/android-studio-releases-list.xml) as well as by executing the [printProductsReleases](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-tasks.html#printProductsReleases) task.\n\nIntelliJ Platform installers are OS-specific and contain bundled [JetBrains Runtime (JBR)](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-jetbrains-runtime.html), but are limited to public releases only.\n\nTo apply required repositories, use [Default Repositories](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-repositories-extension.html#default-repositories) or explicit [IntelliJ Platform Installers](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-repositories-extension.html#intellij-platform-installers) helpers.\n\n### Multi-OS Archives﻿\n\nIt is still possible to use Multi-OS ZIP archives resolved from [IntelliJ Maven Repositories](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-repositories-extension.html#intellij-maven-repositories).\n\nTo enable resolving this kind of artifacts, opt-out from the installer dependencies by adding&#96;useInstaller = false&#96; argument to helpers described in [Target Platforms](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-dependencies-extension.html#target-platforms), like:\n\nKotlin\n\nGroovy\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;kotlin\nrepositories {\n  intellijPlatform {\n    defaultRepositories()\n  }\n}\n\ndependencies {\n  intellijPlatform {\n    intellijIdea(\"2026.1\", useInstaller = false)\n  }\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;groovy\nrepositories {\n  intellijPlatform {\n    defaultRepositories()\n  }\n}\n\ndependencies {\n  intellijPlatform {\n    intellijIdea \"2026.1\", false\n  }\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nThe Multi-OS Archives don't bundle [JetBrains Runtime (JBR)](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-jetbrains-runtime.html) needed to run the IDE locally, perform testing, and other crucial operations. Therefore, it is required to explicitly add a dependency on JetBrains Runtime (JBR) by adding extra&#96;jetbrainsRuntime()&#96; repository and dependency entries.\n\nIt is advised to rely on installer releases, but targeting EAP multi-OS archives helps when making sure your plugin will work in the upcoming IDE releases.\n\nTo apply required repositories, use [Default Repositories](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-repositories-extension.html#default-repositories) or explicit [IntelliJ Maven Repositories](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-repositories-extension.html#intellij-maven-repositories) helpers.\n\n## Plugins﻿\n\nMake sure that required [plugin repositories](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-repositories-extension.html#plugin-repositories) are defined to access non-bundled plugins.\n\nSee also:\n\n[Plugin Dependencies](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/plugin-dependencies.html)\n\n### tip\n\nBundled vs. Non-Bundled Plugins\n\nUse the correct function depending on whether the targeted plugin is bundled with the Target Platform or not.\n\n### Bundled Plugin﻿\n\nUse&#96;bundledPlugin(id)&#96; or&#96;bundledPlugins(ids)&#96; to add a dependency on the bundled plugin within the currently targeted IntelliJ Platform. The list of bundled plugin IDs is available via [printBundledPlugins](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-tasks.html#printBundledPlugins) task.\n\nFunction\n\nDescription\n\n&#96;bundledPlugin(id)&#96;\n\nAdds a dependency on a bundled plugin.\n\n&#96;bundledPlugins(ids)&#96;\n\nAdds a dependency on multiple bundled plugins.\n\n### Bundled Modules﻿\n\nUse&#96;bundledModule(id)&#96; or&#96;bundledModules(ids)&#96; to add a dependency on an IntelliJ Platform bundled module. This is useful when a specific platform module is required on the classpath.\n\nFunction\n\nDescription\n\n&#96;bundledModule(id)&#96;\n\nAdds a dependency on a bundled module.\n\n&#96;bundledModules(ids)&#96;\n\nAdds a dependency on multiple bundled modules.\n\n### Non-Bundled Plugin﻿\n\nUse&#96;plugin(notation)&#96; or&#96;plugins(notations)&#96; to add a dependency on a non-bundled plugin (for example, hosted on [JetBrains Marketplace](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/)).\n\nParameter&#96;notation&#96; uses the following format:\n\n&#96;pluginId:version&#96; or\n\n&#96;pluginId:version@channel&#96;.\n\nAlternatively, use:\n\n&#96;plugin(id, version, group)&#96;– where&#96;group&#96; may define a release channel, like&#96;@eap&#96;, or a full Maven coordinates group (defaults to&#96;com.jetbrains.plugins&#96;).\n\n&#96;plugins(vararg notations)&#96;/&#96;plugins(List)&#96;– for multiple plugins.\n\nThe&#96;group&#96; parameter can also describe the release channel by prefixing the value with&#96;@&#96; character, like&#96;@eap&#96; or&#96;@nightly&#96;. The channel value is used to prepend the JetBrains Marketplace group and build&#96;nightly.com.jetbrains.plugins&#96;.\n\nIf defined explicitly, can be used along with any custom plugin repository, like&#96;org.acme.plugins&#96;.\n\nFunction\n\nDescription\n\n&#96;plugin(id, version, group)&#96;\n\nAdds a dependency on a plugin.\n\n&#96;plugin(notation)&#96;\n\nAdds a dependency on a plugin.\n\n&#96;plugins(notations)&#96;\n\nAdds a dependency on multiple plugins.\n\n### Compatible Plugins﻿\n\nHelpers that automatically pick a version compatible with the currently configured IntelliJ Platform by requesting the JetBrains Marketplace API.\n\nThese resolve plugin versions against the target platform configured via this extension. Make sure the required [plugin repositories](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-repositories-extension.html#plugin-repositories) are defined.\n\nFunction\n\nDescription\n\n&#96;compatiblePlugin(id)&#96;\n\nAdds a dependency on a compatible plugin.\n\n&#96;compatiblePlugins(ids)&#96;\n\nAdds a dependency on multiple compatible plugins.\n\n### Multi-Module Setup﻿\n\nWhen working on a multi-module project, use&#96;pluginComposedModule(dependency)&#96; to add a dependency on a plugin module to be bundled within the main plugin JAR. This will produce a single plugin Jar file with all submodules' classes composed:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;kotlin\npluginComposedModule(implementation(project(\":submodule\")))\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nIn order to use the plugin model v2, use the&#96;pluginModule(dependency)&#96; instead, which will move the submodule's jar into the&#96;lib/modules/&#96; subdirectory.\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;kotlin\npluginModule(implementation(project(\":submodule\")))\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n### Local Plugin﻿\n\nUse&#96;localPlugin(localPath)&#96; to add a dependency on a local IntelliJ Platform plugin.\n\n## Testing﻿\n\nTo implement [tests](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/testing-plugins.html) for IntelliJ Platform plugin, it is necessary to explicitly add a dependency on the&#96;test-framework&#96; library containing the necessary test base classes. In most cases, the&#96;TestFrameworkType.Platform&#96; variant will be used:\n\nKotlin\n\nGroovy\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;kotlin\nimport org.jetbrains.intellij.platform.gradle.TestFrameworkType\n\ndependencies {\n  intellijPlatform {\n    testFramework(TestFrameworkType.Platform)\n  }\n\n  testImplementation(\"junit:junit:4.13.2\")\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;groovy\nimport org.jetbrains.intellij.platform.gradle.TestFrameworkType\n\ndependencies {\n  intellijPlatform {\n    testFramework TestFrameworkType.Platform.INSTANCE\n  }\n\n  testImplementation 'junit:junit:4.13.2'\n}\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nSee [TestFrameworkType](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-types.html#TestFrameworkType) reference for other test-frameworks, for example,&#96;Plugin.Java&#96; when testing Java-based functionality.\n\nThe provided&#96;testFramework(type, version)&#96; helper method makes it possible to add the base artifact to the test classpath or its variants, such as Java, Go, ReSharper, etc.\n\nFunction\n\nDescription\n\n&#96;testFramework(type, version)&#96;\n\nAdds a dependency on Test Framework or its variant using [TestFrameworkType](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-types.html#TestFrameworkType) type.\n\n### warning\n\nIn rare cases, when the presence of a bundled $PLATFORM_PATH$/lib/testFramework.jar library is necessary (like in the case of [Rider](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/rider.html), as its&#96;test-framework&#96; is not published as an artifact), it is possible to attach it by using the [TestFrameworkType.Platform.Bundled](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-types.html#TestFrameworkType) type.\n\nThere are two known issues related to&#96;Platform&#96; and&#96;JUnit5&#96; Test Frameworks:\n\n[Missing opentest4j dependency in Test Framework](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-faq.html#missing-opentest4j-dependency-in-test-framework)\n\n[JUnit5 Test Framework refers to JUnit4](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-faq.html#junit5-test-framework-refers-to-junit4)\n\nSee also:\n\n[Types: TestFrameworkType](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-types.html#TestFrameworkType)\n\n### Test-scope plugin and module helpers﻿\n\nThe extension also provides helpers to add dependencies needed only for tests:\n\nFunction\n\nDescription\n\n&#96;testPlugin(notation)&#96;\n\nAdds a test dependency on a non-bundled plugin using&#96;pluginId:version&#96; or&#96;pluginId:version@channel&#96; notation.\n\n&#96;testPlugins(vararg notations)&#96;\n\nAdds test dependencies on multiple non-bundled plugins.\n\n&#96;testBundledPlugin(id)&#96;\n\nAdds a test dependency on a bundled plugin by ID.\n\n&#96;testBundledPlugins(vararg ids)&#96;\n\nAdds test dependencies on multiple bundled plugins by IDs.\n\n&#96;testLocalPlugin(localPath)&#96;\n\nAdds a test dependency on a local plugin; accepts a path or a project dependency.\n\n&#96;testBundledModule(id)&#96;\n\nAdds a test dependency on a specific bundled platform module.\n\n&#96;testBundledModules(vararg ids)&#96;\n\nAdds test dependencies on multiple bundled platform modules.\n\nProvider and list-based overloads are available for the above helpers, mirroring their production-scope counterparts.\n\n## Tools﻿\n\nFunction\n\nDescription\n\n&#96;pluginVerifier(version)&#96;\n\nAdds a dependency on [IntelliJ Plugin Verifier](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/verifying-plugin-compatibility.html). Applied by default and refers to the latest available tool's version.\n\n&#96;zipSigner(version)&#96;\n\nAdds a dependency on [Marketplace ZIP Signer](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/plugin-signing.html). Applied by default and refers to the latest available tool's version.\n\n&#96;bundledLibrary(path)&#96;\n\nSEE NOTE BELOW\n\nAdds a dependency on a bundled library JAR file of the current IntelliJ Platform, like lib/annotations.jar.\n\n&#96;platformDependency(coordinates, version)&#96;\n\nAdds a dependency on a custom IntelliJ Platform dependency available in the [IntelliJ Maven Repositories](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-repositories-extension.html#intellij-maven-repositories). If version is omitted, the closest compatible version is used.\n\n&#96;testPlatformDependency(coordinates, version)&#96;\n\nAdds a test dependency on a custom IntelliJ Platform dependency available in the [IntelliJ Maven Repositories](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-repositories-extension.html#intellij-maven-repositories). If version is omitted, the closest compatible version is used.\n\n### warning\n\nDo not use&#96;bundledLibrary()&#96; in production, as direct access to the IntelliJ Platform libraries is not recommended.\n\nIt should only be used as a workaround in case the IntelliJ Platform Gradle Plugin is not aligned with the latest IntelliJ Platform classpath changes.\n\nSee also:\n\n[Verifying Plugin Compatibility](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/verifying-plugin-compatibility.html), [Tasks: verifyPlugin](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-tasks.html#verifyPlugin)\n\n[Plugin Signing](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/plugin-signing.html), [Tasks: signPlugin](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-tasks.html#signPlugin)\n\n## Java Runtime﻿\n\nUsing the&#96;jetbrainsRuntime()&#96; or&#96;jetbrainsRuntimeExplicit()&#96; dependency helpers, it is possible to load a custom version of JetBrains Runtime. However, it is recommended to rely on the runtime bundled within the IntelliJ Platform dependency, if present.\n\nThe&#96;jetbrainsRuntime()&#96; helper is applied by default and if JetBrains Runtime is not bundled within the currently used IntelliJ Platform, it refers the relevant runtime version automatically.\n\nFunction\n\nDescription\n\n&#96;jetbrainsRuntime()&#96;\n\nAdds a dependency on [JetBrains Runtime](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/ide-development-instance.html#using-a-jetbrains-runtime-for-the-development-instance) in version obtained with the current IntelliJ Platform if resolved from IntelliJ Maven Repository.\n\n&#96;jetbrainsRuntime(version, variant, architecture)&#96;\n\nAdds a dependency on [JetBrains Runtime](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/ide-development-instance.html#using-a-jetbrains-runtime-for-the-development-instance).\n\n&#96;jetbrainsRuntimeLocal(path)&#96;\n\nAdds a dependency on a local [JetBrains Runtime](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/ide-development-instance.html#using-a-jetbrains-runtime-for-the-development-instance) instance.\n\n&#96;jetbrainsRuntimeExplicit(explicitVersion)&#96;\n\nAdds a dependency on [JetBrains Runtime](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/ide-development-instance.html#using-a-jetbrains-runtime-for-the-development-instance) in explicit version.\n\nSee [JetBrains Runtime (JBR)](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-jetbrains-runtime.html) for more details.\n\n## Code Instrumentation﻿\n\nThe code instrumentation process handled with the [instrumentCode](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-tasks.html#instrumentCode) task, requires extra dependencies to work and properly adjust the Java bytecode. There used to be an&#96;instrumentationTools()&#96; convenience helper that applied the required dependencies using defaults; it is now deprecated and calling it is no longer necessary. You can still add and configure the dependencies separately if needed.\n\nAdds a Java Compiler dependency for code instrumentation. The version is determined by the IntelliJ Platform build number. If the exact version is unavailable, the closest one is used, found by scanning all releases.\n\nThe&#96;javaCompiler()&#96; helper is applied by default and refers to the tool version close to the currently used IntelliJ Platform.\n\nFunction\n\nDescription\n\n&#96;instrumentationTools()&#96;\n\nDeprecated: calling this helper is no longer necessary; previously applied&#96;javaCompiler()&#96;.\n\n&#96;javaCompiler()&#96;\n\n&#96;javaCompiler(version)&#96;\n\nAdds a dependency on Java Compiler.\n\n[instrumentCode](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-tasks.html#instrumentCode)\n\n## Grammar and Parser Generation﻿\n\nHelpers for the [GrammarKit](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-plugins.html#grammarkit) plugin tasks.\n\nFunction\n\nDescription\n\n&#96;grammarKit()&#96;&#96;grammarKit(version)&#96;\n\nAdds a Grammar Kit dependency used by [generateParser](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-tasks.html#generateParser).\n\n&#96;jflex()&#96;&#96;jflex(version)&#96;\n\nAdds a JFlex dependency used by [generateLexer](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-tasks.html#generateLexer).\n\n## Compose UI﻿\n\nFunction\n\nDescription\n\n&#96;composeUI()&#96;\n\nAdds the bundled modules required for working with Compose UI in the IntelliJ Platform.\n\n## Dependency Exclusions﻿\n\nFunction\n\nDescription\n\n&#96;excludeKotlinStdlib()&#96;\n\nExcludes transitive Kotlin Standard Library artifacts from a dependency.\n\n&#96;excludeCoroutines()&#96;\n\nExcludes transitive Kotlin Coroutines artifacts from a dependency.\n\n### note\n\nSomething missing?\n\nIf a topic is not covered in the above sections, let us know via the Was this page helpful? feedback form below or [other channels](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/getting-help.html#problems-with-the-guide).\n\nBe specific about the topics and reasons for adding them and leave your email in case we need more details. Thanks for your feedback!\n\nThanks for your feedback!\n\nWas this page helpful?\n\nYesNo",
  "url": "https://plugins.jetbrains.com/docs/intellij/tools-intellij-platform-gradle-plugin-dependencies-extension.html"
}
```
